benefits.description: Tried PT-141 multiple times at up to 3mg but reported no response. Noted from forums that PT-141 is very hit or miss with women and some respond while others don't.

protocol_notes: Spouse (male, 45 years old) takes 1.5-2mg PT-141 around 4pm and 9-10pm, experiences strong erection by 9-10pm lasting through multiple rounds until ~3am and again around 8am. Spouse experiences nausea for 45min-1 hour after dosing, managed with Pepto-Bismol and ginger chews. Couple has been using this protocol for 8 years. Also incorporates Delta 9 cannabis. Couple has sex 6-7 days per week (~10-14 ejaculations per week for husband); increased frequency helped resolve husband's premature ejaculation that developed in mid-30s.
